name: Stigmem
description: Federated knowledge fabric and intent protocol for AI agents. Provides typed, traceable, decaying facts that replicate across nodes and organizations.

mcp.description: Model Context Protocol adapter — connect any MCP-compatible agent to a Stigmem node

quickstart: git clone https://github.com/eidetic-labs/stigmem && cd stigmem && docker compose up --build -d
